## What changed

Describe your changes.

## Why

Explain motivation and impact.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Content update (JSON routes)

## Checklist

- [ ] I ran `flutter analyze` and it passes.
- [ ] I kept scope focused (no unrelated changes).
- [ ] I updated docs when behavior changed.
- [ ] If UI changed, I attached screenshots/GIF.
- [ ] If JSON changed, it follows `docs/content/activity_contracts.md`.

## Notes for reviewers

Any area that needs extra attention.
